# machine generated by fibs, don't edit or commit to version control!
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(yame C CXX)
find_program(DENO deno REQUIRED)
set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY USE_FOLDERS ON)
set(CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES Debug Release)
set(CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_SUFFIX .html)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/dist/emsc-ninja-release)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_DEBUG /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/dist/emsc-ninja-release)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_RELEASE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/dist/emsc-ninja-release)
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/dist/emsc-ninja-release)
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_DEBUG /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/dist/emsc-ninja-release)
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_RELEASE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/dist/emsc-ninja-release)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
add_compile_options("$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-flto>" "-Wall" "-Wextra" "-Wno-missing-field-initializers" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-O3>" "$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-exceptions>" "$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-rtti>" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-flto>")
add_link_options("-sINITIAL_MEMORY=33554432" "-sSTACK_SIZE=524288" "-sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1" "-sMALLOC='emmalloc'" "-sNO_FILESYSTEM=1" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-flto>" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:--closure>" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:1>" "--shell-file=/Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/fibs-extras/shell.html" "$<$<LINK_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-exceptions>" "$<$<LINK_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-rtti>" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-flto>")
add_custom_command(COMMAND ${DENO} run --allow-all --no-config jsr:@floooh/fibs runjobs emsc-ninja-release VERBATIM COMMENT "Running build jobs" OUTPUT /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/build/emsc-ninja-release/common/shaders.glsl.h DEPENDS /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/shaders.glsl WORKING_DIRECTORY /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame)
add_custom_target(ALL_JOBS DEPENDS /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/build/emsc-ninja-release/common/shaders.glsl.h)
add_library(imgui-docking STATIC EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/cimgui.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/cimgui_internal.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui_demo.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui_draw.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui_tables.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui_widgets.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui.cpp)
source_group(TREE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking FILES /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/cimgui.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/cimgui_internal.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui_demo.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui_draw.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui_tables.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui_widgets.cpp /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/imgui.cpp)
target_include_directories(imgui-docking PUBLIC "/Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/dcimgui/src-docking/.")
target_compile_options(imgui-docking PUBLIC "-Wno-unused-function")
add_library(sokol INTERFACE )
source_group(TREE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/sokol FILES )
target_include_directories(sokol INTERFACE "/Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/sokol/.")
target_include_directories(sokol INTERFACE "/Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/sokol/./util")
target_compile_definitions(sokol INTERFACE "SOKOL_GLES3=1")
target_link_options(sokol INTERFACE "-sUSE_WEBGL2=1")
add_library(stb INTERFACE )
source_group(TREE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/stb FILES )
target_include_directories(stb INTERFACE "/Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/imports/stb/.")
target_compile_options(stb INTERFACE "-Wno-sign-conversion"  INTERFACE "-Wno-unused-function")
add_library(common STATIC EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/sokol.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/clock.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/clock.h /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/fs.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/fs.h /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/gfx.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/gfx.h /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/build/emsc-ninja-release/common/shaders.glsl.h)
source_group(TREE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol FILES /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/sokol.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/clock.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/clock.h /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/fs.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/fs.h /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/gfx.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/gfx.h)
source_group(gen FILES /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/build/emsc-ninja-release/common/shaders.glsl.h)
target_link_libraries(common sokol)
add_dependencies(common ALL_JOBS)
target_include_directories(common PRIVATE "/Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/.fibs/build/emsc-ninja-release/common")
set_target_properties(common PROPERTIES FOLDER common)
add_library(ui STATIC EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/ui.cc /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/ui.h)
source_group(TREE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol FILES /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/ui.cc /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/libs/sokol/ui.h)
target_link_libraries(ui imgui-docking common)
set_target_properties(ui PROPERTIES FOLDER common)
add_executable(mo5 /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/main.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/keybuf.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/m6809.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5rom.c)
source_group(TREE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src FILES /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/main.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/keybuf.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/m6809.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5rom.c)
target_link_libraries(mo5 common)
target_include_directories(mo5 PUBLIC "/Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/../libs/sokol")
set_target_properties(mo5 PROPERTIES FOLDER src)
add_executable(mo5-ui /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/main.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5-ui-impl.cc /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/keybuf.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/m6809.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5rom.c)
source_group(TREE /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src FILES /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/main.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5-ui-impl.cc /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/keybuf.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/m6809.c /Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/mo5rom.c)
target_link_libraries(mo5-ui ui)
target_include_directories(mo5-ui PUBLIC "/Users/scemino/Projects/c/yame/src/../libs/sokol")
target_compile_definitions(mo5-ui PUBLIC "EMU_USE_UI=1")
set_target_properties(mo5-ui PROPERTIES FOLDER src)
